Stretch Fabric Material for Indoor Trade Show Displays

This large banner frame (Slider) is a great alternative to standard pop up backwall displays. The Slider frame can adjust from an 81" to 120" width & 41.5" to 96" height display. Pole pockets are sewn on top and bottom of the fabric print. The frame is constructed out of 1.5" telescopic poles that slide, allowing multiple graphic sizes to be used on the display.

Material: 9 oz. Stretch Fabric Material
Frame Color: Black

Package Includes:

  • (1) Single Sided Graphic
  • (2) 4 1/2" Pole Pockets (Top and Bottom)
  • (1) Large Slider Frame
  • (1) Black Nylon Carry Bag

Warranty: 1 Year on Graphic and Frame

Other Features:

  • Display Size: 96"W x 96"H
  • Graphic Size: 96"W x 94"H
  • Shipping Size: 41" x 5" x 4"
  • Banner Materials: Stretch Fabric, Dye-Sublimation
  • Weight: 16 lbs
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Stretch Fabric Material for Indoor Trade Show Displays

Our backdrop replacement banners are printed on premium 9 oz. stretch fabric material specifically designed for indoor trade show and event displays. This material provides:

  • Wrinkle-resistant properties for professional presentation appearance
  • Vibrant color reproduction through dye-sublimation printing process
  • Lightweight construction for easy transport and setup
  • Durable fabric composition that withstands repeated use

The stretch fabric material is optimized for indoor environments and provides excellent print quality for graphics, text, and photography. This material works seamlessly with the adjustable slider frame system for multiple display configurations.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Backdrop Banner Finishing Options for Professional Presentations

Every backdrop replacement banner includes professional finishing options designed for the slider frame system:

Pole Pocket Construction

  • 4.5" pole pockets sewn on top and bottom edges
  • Reinforced stitching for secure frame attachment
  • Precise measurements for proper slider frame fit

Professional Hemming

  • Clean-finished edges on all sides
  • Double-fold hems for added durability
  • Color-matched thread for seamless appearance

Frame Compatibility

All backdrop banners are specifically sized and finished for use with the adjustable slider frame system, accommodating display sizes from 81" to 120" width and 41.5" to 96" height.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Backdrop Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for backdrop replacement banners. Choose the production schedule that meets your event timeline:

5 Business Days Production

Standard production time for backdrop banners with cost savings.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST processed next business day
  • Production begins after artwork approval
  • Includes quality control and finishing

7 Business Days Production

Extended production time with additional cost savings for non-urgent orders.

  • Ideal for advance event planning
  • Same quality standards as rush production
  • Production starts after final approval

Rush Production Available

Emergency and same-day rush options available in select cases. Contact customer service for rush production availability and pricing.

Note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time to your location.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Backdrop Banner Payment & Ordering Options

All backdrop replacement banners must be paid for prior to production. We offer multiple convenient payment methods:

Credit Card Payments

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Secure online processing
  • Payment processed after proof approval

Check Payments

  • Personal and business checks accepted
  • Check must clear before production begins
  • Allow additional time for check processing

Purchase Orders

Corporate purchase orders available. Contact customer service to discuss purchase order terms and processing.

Minimum Order: $35.00 product minimum required for all orders.

Payment Processing: Credit cards are charged only after you approve your backdrop banner proof.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Backdrop Banner Delivery

Choose your preferred shipping method when ordering your backdrop replacement banner. We offer multiple shipping speeds to meet your event timeline:

Available Shipping Methods

  • Economy Shipping: 5-10 Business Days
  • Standard Shipping: 3-5 Business Days (covers 90% of US)
  • Three Day: 3 Business Days
  • Two Day: 2 Business Days
  • Overnight: Next Business Day
  • Freight: For large or multiple banner orders

Shipping Information

  • Tracking number provided when banner ships
  • Shipping costs based on weight and destination
  • Backdrop banners typically ship via standard carriers
  • International shipping available with customer-provided labels

Packaging & Protection

Backdrop replacement banners are carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit. Large banners may be folded for shipping when necessary due to carrier size restrictions.

Recommendation: Order backdrop banners well in advance of your event date to account for production and shipping time.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Event Uses for Custom Backdrop Banners

Backdrop replacement banners are ideal for professional presentations and indoor display applications:

Trade Show Applications

  • Trade show booths and exhibition displays
  • Product launches and company presentations
  • Conference backdrops for speaking engagements
  • Brand messaging at industry events

Corporate Events

  • Company meetings and annual conferences
  • Award ceremonies and recognition events
  • Training sessions and workshops
  • Corporate branding at special events

Special Events

  • Wedding receptions and ceremony backdrops
  • Graduation celebrations and photo opportunities
  • Fundraising events and charity functions
  • Grand openings and promotional events

Presentation Advantages

The adjustable slider frame system allows the same banner to work for multiple booth sizes and event configurations, making it a versatile investment for organizations that participate in various events throughout the year.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Backdrop Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Ensure your backdrop replacement banner prints perfectly by following our artwork specifications:

File Requirements

  • File formats: .eps, .pdf, high-resolution .tiff or .jpg
  • Resolution: 300 DPI minimum for optimal print quality
  • File size limit: 60 MB maximum for online upload
  • Color mode: CMYK preferred for accurate color reproduction

Design Considerations

  • Pole pocket areas: Keep important graphics 5" from top and bottom edges
  • Text requirements: Minimum 0.25" text height for readability
  • Bleed area: Extend background colors to edge for full coverage
  • Safety margin: Keep critical elements 2" from all edges

Design Templates Available

Download backdrop banner templates in EPS and PDF formats for exact sizing specifications. Templates include pole pocket measurements and safe design areas.

Large File Uploads

For artwork files larger than 60 MB, contact customer service for alternative upload instructions to ensure fastest processing.

Professional Design Service

Our in-house graphic design team can create custom backdrop banner designs. Upload reference materials and provide detailed instructions for custom design work.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Backdrop Banners for Your Next Trade Show

Ready to create a professional backdrop replacement banner that makes your brand stand out? Our custom backdrop banners combine premium stretch fabric materials with expert printing for trade shows, corporate events, and special presentations.

Three Ways to Get Started

1. Choose from Professional Templates

Browse our extensive template library covering business, events, celebrations, and more. Customize colors, text, and graphics using our online design tool.

2. Upload Your Print-Ready Design

Have your artwork ready? Upload your print-ready file and we'll handle the rest. We accept .eps, .pdf, and high-resolution image files.

3. Work with Our Design Team

Let our professional graphic designers create a custom backdrop banner for you. Upload reference materials and provide instructions for a completely custom design.

Why Choose Our Backdrop Banners

  • Premium stretch fabric material for professional appearance
  • Precise pole pocket construction for perfect slider frame fit
  • Vibrant dye-sublimation printing for exceptional color quality
  • Fast turnaround times to meet your event schedule
  • Expert customer service from graphic design professionals

Transform your trade show presence with a custom backdrop replacement banner that showcases your brand professionally. Start designing your banner today.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What sizes are available for backdrop replacement banners?

Our backdrop replacement banners work with the adjustable slider frame system, accommodating display sizes from 81" to 120" width and 41.5" to 96" height. The most popular size is 96"W x 94"H for the graphic area.

How long do backdrop banners take to produce?

Standard production time is 5 business days, with a 7 business day option available for cost savings. Rush production may be available - contact customer service for emergency timelines.

What material are backdrop replacement banners printed on?

We use premium 9 oz. stretch fabric material with dye-sublimation printing. This material is specifically designed for indoor trade show displays and provides vibrant colors with wrinkle-resistant properties.

Can I use my existing artwork for a backdrop banner?

Yes, we accept print-ready files in .eps, .pdf, or high-resolution .tiff/.jpg formats. Files should be 300 DPI minimum and under 60 MB for online upload.

Do backdrop banners come with the frame?

This product is for replacement banners only. If you need a complete backdrop display system including the slider frame, please contact customer service for frame and banner packages.

How are backdrop banners shipped?

Backdrop banners typically ship folded in protective packaging. We offer multiple shipping speeds from economy (5-10 days) to overnight delivery to meet your event timeline.

Can backdrop banners be used outdoors?

Our backdrop banners are designed for indoor trade show and event use. The stretch fabric material and slider frame system are optimized for indoor environments.

What if I need help with my backdrop banner design?

Our customer service team consists of professional graphic designers who can assist with design questions, artwork requirements, and custom design services.
